memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garretts -- Before America
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Garretts — Before America
by John E. Garrett
Last year, I published my work entitled, "1000 Years of Garrett Family History". The emphasis in that effort
was the genealogy of the Garretts since their immigration to America in the mid-seventeenth century. This
work examines how the Garretts evolved during the generations that they spent in England, Wales and
Ireland from the time the first ancestor landed in England until the first Garrett came to America.
My research involved the use of:
 A commercial genealogy website named Ancestry.com.
 Extensive use of the Google search engine on the Internet
The first 100 years, starting in the eleventh century, was the most interesting. That was where I found a
remarkable relationship between my ancestors and King Edward the Confessor, King William the Conqueror
and King Henry I. My first ancestor to land in England, Otho Geraldini, grew-up with Edward before he
became King; his son Walter FitzOtho was in William, the Bastard's army; and his son Gerald grew-up with
Prince Henry (King William"s son) who became King Henry I. Their close relationship is demonstrated by the
vast amount of land, castles and titles bestowed upon them.
In retrospect, I am impressed at how important the genes of the spouses are to the family's genealogy. The
best example of this is when my ancestor, Gerald of Windsor married Nesta Rhys, a Welsh Princess. There
offsprings were all outstanding. The next "high" came when the Garrett's became merchants in the 16th
century, opened trade with Russia, became Lord Mayor of London and honorary knighthood.
To make this work more readable, I have placed several interesting "asides" in the Appendix. For example,
the de Clares, of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare fame married into the Garretts. I found extensive genealogy
on the ancestry of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare going back before 100 AD. So, I put his data into two
appendices. One for the French ancestors and another for the Viking ancestors.

zh.Penrice, Glamorgan, Wales: 威爾士格拉莫爾根利斯
zh.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nesta ferch Rhys於大約1085年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth35歲，母親Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon26歲。她於1104年與Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1136年在威爾士享年53歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾卡維。

zh-hans.Penrice, Glamorgan, Wales: 威尔士格拉莫爾根利斯
zh-hans.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nesta ferch Rhys于大约1085年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth35岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon26岁。她于1104年与Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1136年在威尔士享年53岁，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾卡維。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Nesta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Nesta ferch Rhys was born about 1085, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth, was 35 and her mother, Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon, was 26. She married Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle in 1104, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1136, in Wales, at the age of 53, and was buried in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nesta ferch Rhys est née environ 1085, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle en 1104, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1136, à Galles, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nesta ferch Rhys um 1085 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth 35 und ihre Mutter Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon 26. Sie hat 1104 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1136 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wales und wurde in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nesta ferch Rhys è nata il circa 1085 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle nel 1104, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1136, nel Galles, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Rhysが約1085年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarthは35歳，母Gwladys ferch Rhiwallonは26歳であった。1104年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでGerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1136年にウェールズで53歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Rhys(이)가 대략 1085년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1104년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1136년 웨일스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nesta ferch Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle em 1104, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1136, em Gales, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ro.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nesta ferch Rhys родилась около 1085 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle в 1104 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1136 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nesta ferch Rhys nació aproximadamente 1085, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gerald Fitz Walter Lord Constable of Windsor Castle en 1104, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1136, en Gales, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales.
